# scenario: Tare absolute pressure (PC) on an MC-100SCCM-D equipped
# with a barometer — post-op data frame matching dataframe_format_mc.txt.
# Gated on Capability.BAROMETER at the session layer; without the
# flag, session.execute raises AlicatMissingHardwareError pre-I/O.
# Synthetic — hardware-correctable per design §16.4.

> APC
< A +14.70 +25.0 +25.5 +25.5 +50.0 N2
